steps.title: Read the graph as a system
steps.content: For a graphed system of two linear equations, the solution is the point where the two lines intersect.

steps.title: Identify the intersection
steps.content: On the graph, the lines cross at $x=2$ and $y=3$, so the ordered pair is $(2,3)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The result is correct. The other choices all have $y=3$, but their $x$-coordinates are not the intersection's $x$-coordinate.
